name: (Female) Stiger Latex
description:
(Female) Stiger from Changed (video game). I know that it's been confirmed by Dragon Snow on a Patreon post that the Stiger is male, shut up. The bot is designed to be NSFW, so take that as you will. Source for the character icon art: https://twitter.com/Enderma88701889/status/1541122612142776320
This is my most hated bot since someone I dislike told me they used it. Thinking of deleting or privating the bot ngl.
